description:
A pre-existing disease (PED) refers to a medical condition that a person is already suffering from, before the policy purchase. Unfortunately, the PED waiting period is an obstacle for people who want to claim their PED expenses. The good news is that pre-existing diseases are covered from day one under some plans.

Aur vaise bhi agar co. Customer ko insurance deti hai toh claim dena bound hona chahiye.

comments.text: 2020 main maine Tata aig ka group medicare policy liya,  first premium 14400 ke aspas tha is policy main Hum 4jan te, mai , meri wife, son & daughter's, 2021 main phir se maine 14400 ke pas premium payment Kiya, but next year 2022 main muje abdominal pain karne laga tab main hospital main admit huva, cash less treatment ka option tha esliyw main relaxed feel Kara Raha tha, lekin 3 din baad hospital me RMO mere pas akar bole ki aapki claim reject ho chuka hain, quaki apko Acute Pancreatic ka issue hain aur wo apke policy main nahi hain ro apko pura payment 86000 payment karke discharge lena hoga, Aise mai maine apne policy company ko call kiya to unhone claim accept karne ke liye mana kar diya, unhone kaha pancreatic deases hain hamare 3 sall ke waiting period me ata hain, apko pehle se ye bimari ti ro apko inform karana ta, jo apne nahi kiya isliye apki policy reject huva hain. Us wakt muje ye nahi pata ta ki pancreas kise kehte hain aur muje acute pancreatitis hai, tab se ab tak main hospital Jane se darta hoon claim milega ki nahi

comments.text:
Please help me to clarify :
I have a problem of my left eye retina in the year 2013. 
I have taken a health insurance for Rs. 5.00 from CARE Company in the year 2019 March 18th. By the time of taking this policy I have not informed regards my previous eye problems as preexisting conditions. 
I have continued my policy for the last 5 years by paying yearly premiums without any claims. 
But in the month of February 2024, I have got a right eye problem of retina. 
The concern Hospital has claimed for the payments for the treatment of the eye with all the previous medical records. 
Now the Care Company has rejected the claim by stating that “ hidden the material fact/ not disclosed the preexisting medical conditions. 
After few days the company has canceled my health insurance policy by stating the same facts. 
My previous health problems had in year 2013..
Taken health policy from Care in the year 2019 March 18th. 
I have continued my policy from 2019 to 2024 for 5 years. 
Please help me how to overcome this problem.
comments.author: @basajanardhana4311

comments.text:
Sharing my experience. 
I bought an mediclaim from IOB bank linked WITH APOLLO Munich in 2019. It was without any medical check up for customer of bank. Then they have shifted it to HDFC Ergo. I have claimed many times for some flu related admission. In 2023 they said me to port my hdfc policy to niva bupa and just after 2 month my dad was detected with prostate cancer and NIVA bupa has cancelled my policy by stating that you have not told us about your dad has asthma. So we are cancelling the policy. So my suggestion to all of you is not to port your old policy in any circumstances.
